created.subject: Goal set: {{title}} — {{community}}
created.title: Goal Created!
created.body: You've set a new goal on {{community}}. Keep going — we'll send you reminders to help you stay on track.

completed.subject: Goal achieved: {{title}} — {{community}}
completed.title: Goal Achieved!
completed.body: Amazing work! You've completed your goal on {{community}}. Your contribution to the community is truly valued.

abandoned.subject: Goal removed: {{title}} — {{community}}
abandoned.title: Goal Removed
abandoned.body: Your goal "{{title}}" has been removed from {{community}}.
abandoned.note: You can set a new goal any time from your profile.

goal_milestone.progress_subject: You're {{percent}}% of the way to your goal!
goal_milestone.progress_body: You've reached {{percent}}% of your goal '{{goal}}'. You're making fantastic progress — keep going!
goal_milestone.complete_body: You've successfully completed your goal '{{goal}}'. This is a fantastic achievement — well done!
